name: snapshot
description: Checkpoint a body of work: a reviewer subagent actively VERIFIES the work read-only (runs gates to confirm 'done' claims), checks it's ON-DIRECTION with the ticket's intent, and finds LEFTOVERS. Then, on your confirm, the orchestrator COMMITS the work scoped (only the reviewed files, gated on green) and posts a substantive status update to the ticket: a thorough comment, a status transition, and (only on material drift) an evergreen description rewrite with append-only Change history. Commit + comment + status + description all land under one batch confirm; nothing auto-posts. A building block: it verifies + commits the checkpoint + reports, never fixes code or files followups. Triggers: \"snapshot this\", \"checkpoint the work\", \"commit and update the ticket\", \"snapshot progress\", \"post a ticket update\", \"update the ticket\", \"status update\", \"report progress to the ticket\", \"update ticket status/description\".
